Dashboard.description: A kiosk system for complete parking payment service that helps users search information, view details, and make payments quickly and easily.

Help.title: Smart Carpark Support
Help.subtitle: Concierge
Help.descLine1: We’re here to ensure your parking experience
Help.descLine2: is as seamless as your drive.

Scan.subtitle: Scan to search for a license plate
Scan.hintLine1: Please position the license plate or QR code
Scan.errorNotFound: This plate record was not found
Scan.errorAlreadyProcessed: This transaction has already been processed
Scan.errorUnexpected: An error occurred. Please try again
Scan.errorPlateTooShort: Plate number must be at least {min} characters

Search.subtitle: Enter your license plate number
Search.errorRequired: Please enter a license plate number
Search.errorAlreadyProcessed: This transaction has already been processed
Search.errorDeviceRequired: Device ID is required. Please activate this device first
Search.errorPlateTooShort: Plate number must be at least {min} characters

Detail.title: Search License Plate
Detail.subtitle: Details
Detail.paymentNote: ***After payment is completed, please exit the parking area within 15 minutes***
Detail.errorPlateNotFound: This plate record was not found

PaymentPopup.title: Payment
PaymentPopup.caption: Scan to pay
PaymentPopup.paymentFailed: Unable to process payment. Please try again
PaymentPopup.qrUnavailable: Payment QR code is not available

Activate.title: Smart Carpark
Activate.subtitle: Enter the activation code for this device
Activate.hint: Enter the activation code generated by Admin
Activate.footer: If the code has expired, please generate a new activation code from Admin
Activate.errorLength: Please enter all {length} digits of the activation code
Activate.errorUnexpected: An error occurred. Please try again

BarrierGate.title: Barrier Gate
BarrierGate.subtitle: Waiting for camera plateNo or transactionId input
BarrierGate.inputHint: Submit input from LPR, camera, or external device
BarrierGate.gateInfoAll: Listening to GATE-A / IN and GATE-A / OUT
BarrierGate.actionExitOpenGate: Thank you for using our service. Opening gate
BarrierGate.actionActiveTransaction: This plate has an active parking transaction
BarrierGate.denyUnpaid: Payment is still required. Please pay at the kiosk
BarrierGate.denyProcessed: This transaction has already been processed or cancelled
BarrierGate.offline: Device cannot connect to the system

PlateCandidatePopup.title: Select your license plate
PlateCandidatePopup.subtitle: Please choose the license plate that matches your vehicle

ReceiptSuccessPopup.title: Payment successful
ReceiptSuccessPopup.thankYou: Thank you for using our service
